mapper.select: SELECT br.id, br.user_id, br.book_id, br.borrow_time, br.return_time, br.expected_return_time, br.status, br.overdue_days, u.`name` AS user_name, b.`name` AS book_name FROM borrow_record br INNER JOIN `user` u ON br.user_id = u.id -- 仅关联有效用户 INNER JOIN book b ON br.book_id = b.id -- 仅关联有效图书 ${ew.customSqlSegment}
SELECT id, expected_return_time, status, version, user_id, book_id FROM borrow_record WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
